nasb.text: Manoah said, “Now when your words come to pass, what shall be the boy’s mode of life and his vocation?”

esv.text: And Manoah said, “Now when your words come true, what is to be the child’s manner of life, and what is his mission?”

cnv.text: 瑪挪亞說：“你的話應驗的時候，這孩子的生活方式怎樣？他要作甚麼呢？”

ccb.text: 玛挪亚问道：“你的话应验以后，我们应该怎样抚养这孩子？他该做什么？”
